name: Rock & Roll Clams
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp chili paste with soya bean
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the clams in cool water, but do not open them.
2. Heat the oil and stir-fry garlic and chili paste until fragrant.
3. Add the clams, then fish sauce and sugar, and stir to mix.
4. Add mint and stock, then cover. Cook until the clams open.
If chili paste with soya bean oil is not available, use Thai BBQ Sauce recipe.
